title: Lymecraft Survival
description: This is the official pack for all VANILLA Lymecraft servers. Optimisations and such for it.
body:
The official Lymecraft Survival pack is what we recommend for joining any Lymecraft vanilla servers.

It features many performance optimisations such as Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore and others, plus some neat features like Distant Horizons, allowing you to have massive render distances.

While intended solely for the Lymecraft network, this pack does work on its own for singleplayer use, and also includes e4mc for multiplayer hosting.

**LYMECRAFT DID NOT MAKE ANY OF THE MODS IN THIS PACK. ALL MODS BELONG TO THEIR RESPECTIVE AUTHORS.**
